title: Nemo Clawd Clawd Plugin Manifest
description: Schema for nemoclaw/clawd.plugin.json. The Clawd plugin manifest declares the Nemo Clawd plugin identity and configuration schema.

commandAliases.description: Runtime command names that resolve to this plugin's handlers, such as chat slash commands.

name.description: Command name that belongs to this plugin.

kind.description: Marks the alias as a chat slash command rather than a root CLI command.

activation.description: Clawd activation planner metadata. Use onStartup=true when plugin registration must run during gateway startup.

onStartup.description: Whether Clawd should import the plugin during gateway startup.

configSchema.description: JSON Schema object describing the plugin's configuration fields.
